title: DRW MD-DRW-525: Motor Cable Routing
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-525 Rev E — Motor Cable Routing

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1037, P-1038, P-1053, P-1054, P-1058.
